prestazioni: For the **1.8T (AWT/AMB engine code)**, install a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** with a **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate**, paired with a **Forge Motorsport 0.5 Bar Hybrid BOV** and a **custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust** using **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping** and a **Supersprint 76mm rear silencer** for optimized spool and flow.

Replace the stock **A4 B6 1.8T (AWT/AMB) intake manifold** with a **034 Motorsport CNC Ported & Polished Intake Manifold** and pair it with a **Neuspeed P-Flo Carbon Fiber Intake System** featuring a **K&N cone filter (part #57-1042)** for improved throttle response and reduced heat soak. Upgrade the intercooler to a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (FMIC) with 60mm core thickness** and **custom silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance (part #16720)** for consistent IATs under boost.

Swap the stock **A4 B6 1.8T (AWT/AMB) fuel system** for a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (part #GSS342)**, **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors (part #62406)**, and a **Bosch 044 external fuel pump** with a **Radium Engineering dual-pump hanger** for E85 compatibility. Tune via **Unitronic Stage 2+ ECU/TCU software (file #UNI-A4B6-18T-S2P)** with a **Cobb Accessport V3 (part #AP3-VDF-001)** for real-time monitoring and logging.
estetica: Install the **Rocket Bunny V1 A4 B6 widebody kit** with **custom 3M 2080 Gloss Black vinyl over OEM paint** for aggressive fender flares and a **custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon (part #CF-A4B6-HOOD)** with **hidden washer nozzles** and a **functional NACA duct** for brake cooling.

Replace the stock **A4 B6 front bumper** with a **APR Carbon Fiber Front Lip Spoiler (part #A4B6-101-010)** and add **custom side skirts from Eurocode Tuning (part #EC-A4B6-SS)** in **raw carbon fiber finish**. For the rear, install a **Maxton Design GT-S rear diffuser (part #A4B6-RD-01)** with **integrated dual 3-inch exhaust cutouts** and **LED reverse light pods**.

Upgrade the wheels to **BBS LM-R 18x9.5 ET35 (front) and 18x10.5 ET40 (rear)** with **custom 5x112 to 5x120 adapters from WCI Wheels** and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear)**. Lower the car with **KW Clubsport Coilovers (part #35241001)** with **custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane subframe bushings from 034 Motorsport (part #034-401-101S)** for improved handling.
